name: infinitas-skill
description: Hosted control plane for the infinitas private skill registry

scripts.build: npm run purge:css && npm run build:css && node scripts/build-asset-hashes.js
scripts.test: npm run build:css && node -e "console.log('note: npm test only verifies the frontend asset build; run make ci-fast or scripts/check-all.sh for real validation')"
